title: pimpinella henryi
intro: Pimpinella henryi, also known as Henry's burnet or Chinese burnet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Pimpinella henryi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Pimpinella henryi is typically prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, with the root and leaf being used in various herbal preparations.
